name: INSPIRED THOUGHT
effect: Gain ActionPoint for this model's activation. Requires Gear to use it.

name: TOUGHER THAN IT LOOKS
effect: Negate Blast on single roll.

name: CALLED SHOT
effect: COMBAT: Before roll, swap 1 BlackDie / YellowDie / BlueDie for 1 GreenDie

name: PERFECT TIMING
effect: Ignore penalties for using ranged weapon in close combat.

name: WHAT WAS THAT?
effect: After a model is aware of a trigger, add Eye, but this can not be used as a Reaction to the initial trigger.

name: FALSE START
effect: Re-roll V.A.T.S. roll

name: SPECIAL SKILLS
effect: Play after skill roll, + Bottle

name: A BIT SPECIAL
effect: Change a number of Bottle to an equal number of Star

name: USE YOUR BODY
effect: COMBAT: Before roll, swap 1 YellowDie / GreenDie for 1 BlackDie

name: ENHANCED PIERCING
effect: Re-roll all YellowDie

name: BEHIND YOU!
effect: Break engagement without causing any free attacks.

name: ANTICIPATED
effect: React to trigger when action causing the trigger is declared.

name: AMPLIFIED EFFECT
effect: Re-roll any blank faces on BlackDie, YellowDie, GreenDie

name: DELAYED EVENT
effect: When Current Event is to be discarded, it is not discarded and remains in effect. Event is discarded at end of next round.

name: SLIP FREE
effect: Slide can break engagement (but free attack still applies).

name: ENHANCED ACCURACY
effect: Re-roll all

name: ADMIN OVERRIDE
effect: Remove locked effect (due to Action) on computer terminal.

name: HIGHLY ALERT
effect: All triggers sensed at two ruler lengths.

name: LIKE A SHADOW
effect: The model causes no triggers during its activation.

name: MORE PIERCING
effect: Re-roll 1 YellowDie

name: LUCKY BOUNCE
effect: Re-determine scatter direction.

name: PIERCING ATTACK
effect: COMBAT: Play after skill roll, +1 Blast

name: INSTANT LUCK
effect: Immediately use 1 Luck as if model can use Luck (even if model has Luck ability). Use token from supply.

name: SECOND CHANCE
effect: Re-roll skill dice only (only after ActionPoint)

name: EXTRA USE
effect: Do not discard a Limited Use Item (or counting token on a Limited Use item) after use.

name: LUCKY ROLL
effect: Increase/decrease scatter distance by one color (not less than Orange)

name: VERY SPECIAL
effect: Change Bottle/Bottle / Star into Explosion

name: FIRST TEAM GO
effect: You may choose which of your Ready models you activate. Ready models not activated this turn remain Ready.

name: GIFTED CLIMBER
effect: Automatically climb at Charge distance (if able to climb).

name: RESERVE
effect: After activating all models, Ready a (un-Used) model and activate it with skills all at -2 penalty.

name: WALK IT OFF
effect: Immediately after adding damage, remove up to 2 Star from model. Does not prevent removal. Cannot remove more than the latest source added.

name: FELINE GRACE
effect: When resolving a jump/fall, resolve as if 2 colors lower.

name: AUTHORITATIVE
effect: Until the end of this activation, this model's Presence is one color larger. (If Presence is Black, add Orange.)

name: CRITICAL CONVERSION
effect: Spend 1 Gear to gain 1 Alert!

name: NEXT!
effect: After causing a model to be removed due to an attack, gain a Eye

name: TAKE TWO
effect: COMBAT: Re-roll skill dice only (not after X).

name: QUICK LOAD
effect: Flip BlackDie to GoldDie

name: CAREFULLY DOES IT
effect: NON-COMBAT: Play after skill roll, +1 GreenToken

name: SUDDEN MOVEMENT
effect: Gain ActionPoint for this model's activation. Requires Gear to use it.

name: BATTLE AWARE
effect: Charge without requiring LoS.

name: SNEAK ATTACK
effect: Gain ActionPoint for this model's activation. Requires ActionPoint to use it.

name: ACCURATE ATTACK
effect: COMBAT: Play after skill roll, -2 to skill dice

name: COURAGE
effect: Can use Fist when performing Charge (skill value 5).

name: SAW IT COMING
effect: When drawing an event card, draw 1 extra and choose which takes effect. Place unused card at bottom of deck.

name: SPURRED INTO ACTION
effect: +1 ActionPoint

name: COVERED
effect: Cover increases armor rating by 2 (not 1)

name: EXTRA EFFORT
effect: After a Move action, perform 1 free quick action which is not a movement.

name: THAT WAS LUCKY
effect: After flipping Luck, change result to Luck

name: LINE IT UP
effect: After an attack with any weapon, + Alert to the weapon used.

name: TREAD LIGHTLY
effect: Do not trigger a mine.

name: GO NOW
effect: Action by a friendly model is a trigger for other friendly models.

name: KNEW I WOULD NEED IT
effect: When activating a model, draw 3 Items from the Wasteland. Opponent discards one. Equip model with one of remaining two and discard the other.

name: MOVE ON
effect: After causing a model to be removed due to an attack, perform a Move (not Charge) for free.

name: IN SYNC
effect: Play after hitting an engaged group but before randomising which model is affected. Intended target is affected.

name: EXTINGUISH
effect: When a model with Fire is activated, remove Fire before it does its damage.

name: GET READY
effect: When adding a Eye, also add 1 Eye to a different model within Presence and LoS. Cannot exceed usual maximums.

name: SIXTH SENSE
effect: Re-roll 1 die

name: DEFENSIVE POSITIONING
effect: COMBAT: Play after skill roll, +2 Helmet

name: AIM FOR THE GAP
effect: COMBAT: Before roll, swap 1 BlackDie / GreenDie / BlueDie for 1 YellowDie

name: BRACED
effect: Before roll, remove one ChargeBonus die from opponent's roll.

name: SPRINT
effect: Increase movement by one color.

name: MORE DAMAGING
effect: Re-roll 1 BlackDie

name: PATCH REPAIR
effect: A non-armored model can use an action to remove damage from a nearby armored model. Neither model can be engaged. Cannot restore Power Armor from Degraded.

name: LIGHT FOOTED
effect: Ignore difficult terrain this activation.

name: TRY THAT AGAIN
effect: Discard 1 BlackDie, GreenDie, or YellowDie, then re-roll any remaining BlackDie, GreenDie and/or BlueDie.

name: ROUSING WORDS
effect: Play when activating a model. The model gains +2 to any skill during its first action this turn.

name: FORTUNATE DEFLECTION
effect: Negate 1 Star result

name: JURY RIG
effect: At the start of a battle, 1 non-melee weapon gains Luck. CONSEQUENCE: Weapon explodes causing Armor 2 + Luck. Discard weapon.

name: I DON'T THINK SO
effect: Discard drawn Danger card before resolving it and draw a new Danger card instead. The newly drawn card must be resolved.

name: POWERFUL ATTACK
effect: COMBAT: Play after skill roll, +1 Blast

name: READY FOR MORE
effect: After performing a Reaction, do not remove the Eye.

name: WITH ME
effect: When readying a model, Ready two other (un-Used) models within Presence and LoS — but player cannot activate models this turn.

name: CHECK AGAIN
effect: NON-COMBAT: Play after skill roll, -2 to skill dice

name: ENHANCED DAMAGE
effect: Re-roll all BlackDie

name: SUNLIGHT IN EYES
effect: Attacker's skill has -2 penalty.

name: INDOMITABLE
effect: Change failed result to success.

name: DIG DEEP
effect: Automatically resist. Does not remove effect of Charge.

name: MORE ACCURATE
effect: Re-roll up to 2 GreenDie
